methodology_note: Every benchmark cell carries its own source. Cells marked 'estimate' are explicitly not measurements and never contribute to the composite score; cells marked 'unsourced_legacy' predate provenance tracking and are shown for reference only. The composite is computed solely from independently-sourced or vendor-published figures on the live benchmark set. Benchmarks retired by Artificial Analysis Intelligence Index v4.1 (MATH-500, τ²-Bench, Terminal-Bench Hard) and unmaintained ones (Aider Polyglot) are retained as legacy columns, displayed but never scored, following the demote-don't-delete convention used by Artificial Analysis (https://artificialanalysis.ai/methodology/intelligence-benchmarking). Model scores are frozen at the date they were measured and are not silently recomputed. Pricing is per 1M tokens on each provider's first-party API; open-weights pricing reflects the typical Together / Fireworks / OpenRouter rate.

aa_intelligence_index.label: AA Index
aa_intelligence_index.note: Artificial Analysis Intelligence Index. Version-tagged; scores are frozen at the version they were measured under.

swe_bench_verified.label: SWE-bench Verified
swe_bench_verified.note: Never mix with SWE-bench Pro; Pro runs ~20pt lower on the same model.

hle.label: HLE
hle.note: Humanity's Last Exam. Record whether tools were enabled in the cell note - the two variants differ by ~25pt.

mmlu_pro.label: MMLU-Pro
mmlu_pro.retired: Dropped from the AA Intelligence Index; still run as a standalone eval but no longer reported by most vendors.

humaneval.label: HumanEval
humaneval.retired: Saturated - frontier models cluster at 92-96%, so it no longer separates them.

math_500.label: MATH-500
math_500.retired: Retired from active reporting by Artificial Analysis (Index v4.1).

mmmu.label: MMMU
mmmu.retired: Superseded by the harder MMMU-Pro variant.

aider_polyglot.label: Aider Polyglot
aider_polyglot.retired: Upstream leaderboard is unmaintained - its top entry is still GPT-5 (high) at 88.0 and it tracks no 2026 model.

terminal_bench_2_0.label: Terminal-Bench 2.0
terminal_bench_2_0.retired: Superseded by Terminal-Bench 2.1. Kept as its own column because several vendors (DeepSeek, Qwen, MiniMax) published only 2.0 - folding those into the 2.1 column would repeat the version-mixing this schema exists to prevent.
